[RGON] Conch's Blessing

Adds a polished Magic Conch upgrade system to The Binding of Isaac. Transform items with bespoke visuals, language-aware HUD/EID support, and flexible spawn/timing controls.

Key Features:
- Upgrade Sequence: Before -> Morph -> After
- Multi-language: KR/EN HUD and EID text
- Natural Spawn Toggle: Enable or disable mod item spawns via Mod Config Menu
- Compatible with Mod Config Menu

Required Item:
- Magic Conch

Feature Requirements:
- REPENTOGON (Appraisal Certificate)
- StageAPI (Appraisal Certificate's Atropos return door)

Recommended:
- RGON

Inspiration:
- Visual style inspired by Lazy MattPack [RGON] by Mr. Headcrab.

See the pinned Workshop discussion: Item Description Guide.
